security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://api.groq.com https://api.elevenlabs.io https://www.googleapis.com https://app.posthog.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://api.github.com; font-src 'self'; media-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ws: http://localhost:* https://api.groq.com https://api.elevenlabs.io https://www.googleapis.com https://app.posthog.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://api.github.com; font-src 'self'; media-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
